Why this classification?
Searched PSPLA for: Chaytor Electrical & Security, Chaytor Electrical. A potential PSPLA match was found but rejected as a different company: rejected: Names are essentially identical (trading vs registered name difference only), but locations are incompatible - website lists Waikato region while PSPLA address is Tauranga (Bay of Plenty region). These could be a different branch or the website region may be incorrect, but the geographic mismatch reduces confidence.. No director/owner names found on website to check for individual licenses. Chris Odlum Electrical Te Awamutu 0800 263 669 chris@coelectrical.co.nz EXPIRED Chris Odlum Electrical Ltd
60 FRED PARSONS COURT, TE AWAMUTU 3800
 12-002214 26-Jul-2017
Why this classification?
[WARNING] Source inconsistency: Multiple sources consistently point to an electrical business in Te Awamutu, but the NZSA registration under a different company name ('Sefton Electrical Ltd') is a significant red flag. The original premise of this being a 'security company' appears incorrect - all evidence points to an electrical contractor. Either there is a data mix-up between two companies, or one entity operates under multiple trading names without clear explanation.. Searched PSPLA for: Chris Odlum Electrical, Chris Odlum Electrical Ltd. Found PSPLA entry for 'Chris Odlum Electrical Ltd' but license status is EXPIRED (match method: full name). Director/owner names found on website: Chris Odlum. Checked individual PSPLA licenses for each — no active individual license found. Companies Office search for 'Chris Odlum Electrical Ltd' found: CHRIS ODLUM ELECTRICAL LIMITED.

Mark McCallNZSA All of New Zealand - Mark.McCall@nzta.govt.nz NOT LICENSED - - -
Why this classification?
Searched PSPLA for: Mark McCall. A potential PSPLA match was found but rejected as a different company: rejected: The website name 'Mark McCall' does not appear word-for-word in the PSPLA name 'Jared Mark Le-pine McCallum'. While 'Mark' appears in both, 'McCall' is not the same as 'McCallum', and the first name on the website ('Mark') corresponds to a middle name in the PSPLA record, with a completely different first name ('Jared'). These are likely different individuals.. No director/owner names found on website to check for individual licenses. Companies Office search for 'Mark McCall' returned no match.

Why this classification?
[WARNING] Source inconsistency: Major red flag: LinkedIn URL points to a different company (Arc Security Solutions Limited) with no explanation. All other sources (website, PSPLA, Companies Office, Facebook) consistently reference Northland CCTV at the Kerikeri address. The LinkedIn profile appears to be either incorrect, associated with a parent/subsidiary company, or a data entry error requiring immediate verification.. Searched PSPLA for: Northland CCTV, Northland CCTV Ltd. Company license found for 'NORTHLAND CCTV LIMITED' but status is EXPIRED (match method: full name (verified: high)). License #14-012229, status: EXPIRED, expires 12-Mar-2019. Director/owner names found on website: Simon John Kent, Matthew Terrance Pickles. Checked individual PSPLA licenses for each — active individual license found under 'Simon John Kent'.
